descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes sweep Kelowna Packers 3-2 to win B.C. Junior League championship.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes, coached by Orland Kurtenbach, defeated Kelowna Packers 3-2 on March 24, 1987, to claim their first B.C. Junior Hockey League championship in eight years. Captain Trevor Dickie and the Sockeyes swept the BCJHL playoffs without a loss in three series. The team advances to face the Peace-Cariboo League champions in a best-of-nine final series beginning April 1 in Richmond.
